name: Node-RED
description: Low-code, flow-based programming for wiring together devices, APIs and online services.
compose:
name: "slashnode-node-red"
services:
  node-red:
    image: "nodered/node-red:5.0.0"
    container_name: "node-red"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      TZ: "UTC"
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:1880:1880"
    volumes:
      - "node-red-data:/data"
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  node-red-data:
    name: "slashnode-node-red_node-red_node-red-data"
notes: Node-RED starts with NO admin authentication (the editor is open). Before exposing it, secure the editor by adding an adminAuth block with a bcrypt-hashed password to /data/settings.js (see https://nodered.org/docs/user-guide/runtime/securing-node-red).
